description: Zentrale Registry aller Workflow-Module fuer den Exasync Workflow Monitor

core/metrics-collector.name: Metrics Collector
core/metrics-collector.description: Sammelt Laufzeit-Metriken und schreibt sie in die agent_metrics Tabelle. Wird von allen Workflows am Ende aufgerufen.
core/metrics-collector.code:
import time
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from supabase import Client

def collect_metrics(sb: Client, workflow_id: str, results: list, start_time: float):
    """Metriken sammeln und in Supabase speichern.
    
    Args:
        sb: Supabase Client-Instanz
        workflow_id: z.B. 'nacke', 'maut', 'fleetboard'
        results: Liste der Ergebnis-Dicts aus dem Workflow
        start_time: Zeitstempel vom Start (time.time())
    """
    # Laufzeit berechnen
    duration_sec = round(time.time() - start_time, 2)
    
    # Erfolge und Fehler zaehlen
    success_count = sum(1 for r in results if r.get('status') == 'ok')
    error_count = sum(1 for r in results if r.get('status') == 'error')
    
    # Metrik-Datensatz zusammenbauen
    metric = {
        'workflow_id': workflow_id,
        'run_date': datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
        'duration_seconds': duration_sec,
        'total_items': len(results),
        'success_count': success_count,
        'error_count': error_count,
        'success_rate': round(success_count / max(len(results), 1) * 100, 1)
    }
    
    # In Supabase einfuegen
    sb.table('agent_metrics').insert(metric).execute()
    
    return metric

core/error-handler.name: Error Handler
core/error-handler.description: Zentraler Error Handler mit Logging, Email-Eskalation und Retry-Logik. Faengt Exceptions ab und entscheidet ob Retry, Skip oder Abbruch.
core/error-handler.code:
import traceback
import logging
from datetime import datetime, timezone

logger = logging.getLogger('exasync')

class WorkflowError(Exception):
    """Basis-Fehler fuer alle Workflow-Probleme."""
    def __init__(self, message, step_id=None, recoverable=True):
        super().__init__(message)
        self.step_id = step_id
        self.recoverable = recoverable

def handle_error(error: Exception, workflow_id: str, step_id: str, sb=None):
    """Fehler behandeln: loggen, speichern, ggf. eskalieren.
    
    Strategie:
    - recoverable=True  -> loggen + weitermachen (skip item)
    - recoverable=False -> loggen + Workflow abbrechen + Email an Bodo
    """
    is_recoverable = getattr(error, 'recoverable', True)
    
    error_record = {
        'workflow_id': workflow_id,
        'step_id': step_id,
        'error_type': type(error).__name__,
        'error_message': str(error),
        'traceback': traceback.format_exc(),
        'recoverable': is_recoverable,
        'timestamp': datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()
    }
    
    logger.error(f'[{workflow_id}/{step_id}] {error}', exc_info=True)
    
    # In DB speichern wenn Supabase verfuegbar
    if sb:
        sb.table('agent_errors').insert(error_record).execute()
    
    if not is_recoverable:
        raise WorkflowError(f'Fataler Fehler in {step_id}: {error}', step_id, False)

maut/date-calculator.name: Maut Zeitraum-Rechner
maut/date-calculator.description: Berechnet den Abfrage-Zeitraum fuer die Mautdaten. Standard: heute -9 bis heute -3 Tage. So werden nur vollstaendig abgerechnete Tage abgefragt.
maut/date-calculator.code:
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

def calculate_date_range(start_offset: int = -9, end_offset: int = -3) -> dict:
    """Zeitraum fuer Mautabfrage berechnen.
    
    Offsets sind negative Tage ab heute:
    - start_offset = -9 -> vor 9 Tagen
    - end_offset = -3   -> vor 3 Tagen
    
    Wir nehmen NICHT die letzten 2 Tage, weil Shell Fleet Hub
    die Daten erst mit 2-3 Tagen Verzoegerung bereitstellt.
    
    Returns:
        Dict mit 'start' und 'end' als formatierte Strings (DD.MM.YYYY)
    """
    today = datetime.now()
    
    date_start = today + timedelta(days=start_offset)
    date_end = today + timedelta(days=end_offset)
    
    # Shell Fleet Hub erwartet deutsches Datumsformat
    return {
        'start': date_start.strftime('%d.%m.%Y'),
        'end': date_end.strftime('%d.%m.%Y'),
        'start_iso': date_start.strftime('%Y-%m-%d'),
        'end_iso': date_end.strftime('%Y-%m-%d')
    }

maut/shell-login.name: Shell Fleet Hub Login
maut/shell-login.description: Login bei Shell Fleet Hub mit Email, Passwort und TOTP (2-Faktor). TOTP wird dynamisch aus dem Secret generiert, NIEMALS gecacht.
maut/shell-login.code:
import pyotp
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
import logging

logger = logging.getLogger('maut')

def shell_login(email: str, password: str, totp_secret: str) -> dict:
    """Login bei Shell Fleet Hub mit 2-Faktor-Authentifizierung.
    
    Schritte:
    1. Email eingeben + Next
    2. Passwort eingeben + Submit
    3. TOTP-Code dynamisch generieren + eingeben
    
    WICHTIG: TOTP wird JEDES MAL frisch generiert!
    Niemals den Code cachen - er ist nur 30 Sekunden gueltig.
    """
    pw = sync_playwright().start()
    browser = pw.chromium.launch(headless=True)
    page = browser.new_page()
    
    page.goto('https://shell-fleet-hub.shell.com/login')
    logger.info('Shell Fleet Hub Login-Seite geladen')
    
    # Schritt 1: Email
    page.fill('input[type="email"]', email)
    page.click('button:has-text("Next")')
    page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
    
    # Schritt 2: Passwort
    page.fill('input[type="password"]', password)
    page.click('button:has-text("Sign in")')
    page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
    
    # Schritt 3: TOTP - frisch generieren!
    totp = pyotp.TOTP(totp_secret)
    code = totp.now()  # 6-stelliger Code, 30 Sek gueltig
    page.fill('input[name="otp"]', code)
    page.click('button:has-text("Verify")')
    
    # Warten auf Dashboard
    page.wait_for_selector('.dashboard', timeout=15000)
    logger.info('Shell Fleet Hub Login erfolgreich')
    
    return {'browser': browser, 'page': page, 'playwright': pw}

maut/select-account.name: Maut Account-Auswahl
maut/select-account.description: Waehlt den richtigen Account im Shell Fleet Hub aus. Aktuell ist nur Account (M) DE26731323 aktiv. Der Selektor klickt auf den Account-Dropdown und waehlt den richtigen.
maut/select-account.code:
import logging

logger = logging.getLogger('maut')

# Der einzige aktive Account
ACTIVE_ACCOUNT = 'DE26731323'
ACCOUNT_LABEL = 'Account (M)'

def select_account(session: dict) -> dict:
    """Den richtigen Account im Shell Fleet Hub auswaehlen.
    
    Shell Fleet Hub zeigt oben rechts einen Account-Dropdown.
    Wir muessen Account (M) DE26731323 auswaehlen.
    
    ACHTUNG: Es gibt mehrere Accounts. NUR DE26731323 ist aktiv!
    """
    page = session['page']
    
    # Account-Dropdown oeffnen
    page.click('.account-selector')
    page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
    
    # Den richtigen Account per Text finden und klicken
    account_option = page.query_selector(f'text={ACTIVE_ACCOUNT}')
    
    if not account_option:
        raise RuntimeError(f'Account {ACTIVE_ACCOUNT} nicht im Dropdown gefunden!')
    
    account_option.click()
    page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
    
    # Verifizieren dass der richtige Account aktiv ist
    selected = page.text_content('.account-selector .selected')
    if ACTIVE_ACCOUNT not in selected:
        raise RuntimeError(f'Falscher Account ausgewaehlt: {selected}')
    
    logger.info(f'Account {ACCOUNT_LABEL} ({ACTIVE_ACCOUNT}) ausgewaehlt')
    session['account'] = ACTIVE_ACCOUNT
    return session

maut/download-data.name: Mautdaten Download
maut/download-data.description: Laedt die Toll4Europe Mautliste als Excel-Datei herunter. Setzt den Datumsfilter, wartet auf den Export, und speichert die Datei lokal. DRAFT: Download-Selektor muss nach Shell-Update angepasst werden.
maut/download-data.code:
import os
import logging

logger = logging.getLogger('maut')

def download_maut_data(session: dict, date_start: str, date_end: str) -> str:
    """Mautdaten-Excel aus Shell Fleet Hub herunterladen.
    
    Schritte:
    1. Zum Toll4Europe-Bereich navigieren
    2. Datumsfilter setzen (DD.MM.YYYY Format)
    3. Export als Excel anstossen
    4. Download abwarten und Pfad zurueckgeben
    
    TODO: Download-Selektor nach Shell-Update pruefen!
    """
    page = session['page']
    download_dir = os.path.join(os.environ.get('TEMP', '/tmp'), 'maut_downloads')
    os.makedirs(download_dir, exist_ok=True)
    
    # Zum Maut-Bereich navigieren
    page.click('a[href*="toll"]')
    page.wait_for_selector('.toll-data-table', timeout=15000)
    
    # Datumsfilter setzen
    page.fill('#date-from', date_start)
    page.fill('#date-to', date_end)
    page.click('button:has-text("Apply")')
    page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
    
    # Excel-Export starten und Download abfangen
    with page.expect_download() as download_info:
        page.click('button:has-text("Export")')  # TODO: Selektor pruefen!
    
    download = download_info.value
    filepath = os.path.join(download_dir, download.suggested_filename)
    download.save_as(filepath)
    
    logger.info(f'Mautdaten heruntergeladen: {filepath}')
    return filepath

maut/calculate-tolls.name: Maut-Berechnung
maut/calculate-tolls.description: Liest die heruntergeladene Excel-Datei, berechnet Maut pro Kilometer fuer jedes Fahrzeug, und erkennt Anomalien (z.B. ungewoehnlich hohe Maut/km). Nutzt openpyxl fuer Excel-Parsing.
maut/calculate-tolls.code:
import openpyxl
import logging

logger = logging.getLogger('maut')

# Schwellwert fuer Anomalie-Erkennung: ueber 0.25 EUR/km ist verdaechtig
ANOMALY_THRESHOLD_EUR_PER_KM = 0.25

def calculate_tolls(excel_path: str) -> tuple:
    """Maut/km fuer jedes Fahrzeug berechnen.
    
    Die Excel-Datei hat Spalten:
    A=Kennzeichen, B=Strecke, C=km, D=Maut(EUR), E=Datum
    
    Returns:
        Tuple (calculations, anomalies)
        - calculations: Liste aller Berechnungen
        - anomalies: Liste verdaechtiger Eintraege
    """
    wb = openpyxl.load_workbook(excel_path, read_only=True)
    ws = wb.active
    
    calculations = []
    anomalies = []
    
    # Erste Zeile ist Header, ab Zeile 2 kommen die Daten
    for row in ws.iter_rows(min_row=2, values_only=True):
        plate, route, km, toll_eur, date = row[0], row[1], row[2], row[3], row[4]
        
        if not km or km == 0:
            continue  # Division durch 0 vermeiden
        
        toll_per_km = round(toll_eur / km, 4)
        
        entry = {
            'plate': plate, 'route': route,
            'km': km, 'toll_eur': toll_eur,
            'toll_per_km': toll_per_km, 'date': str(date)
        }
        calculations.append(entry)
        
        # Anomalie erkennen
        if toll_per_km > ANOMALY_THRESHOLD_EUR_PER_KM:
            entry['anomaly_reason'] = f'Maut/km {toll_per_km} > {ANOMALY_THRESHOLD_EUR_PER_KM}'
            anomalies.append(entry)
    
    logger.info(f'{len(calculations)} Eintraege berechnet, {len(anomalies)} Anomalien')
    return calculations, anomalies

maut/upload-results.name: Maut Ergebnis Upload
maut/upload-results.description: Schreibt die berechneten Mautdaten nach Supabase in die maut_calculations Tabelle. Nutzt Upsert um bei erneutem Lauf keine Duplikate zu erzeugen.
maut/upload-results.code:
from supabase import Client
import logging

logger = logging.getLogger('maut')

def upload_results(sb: Client, calculations: list) -> int:
    """Berechnungsergebnisse in Supabase speichern.
    
    Nutzt UPSERT statt INSERT:
    - Wenn ein Eintrag (plate + date) schon existiert, wird er aktualisiert
    - Wenn nicht, wird er neu eingefuegt
    - So koennen wir den Job gefahrlos mehrmals laufen lassen
    """
    if not calculations:
        logger.warning('Keine Berechnungen zum Hochladen')
        return 0
    
    # Supabase Upsert mit Conflict-Spalten
    # on_conflict='plate,date' -> wenn plate+date schon existiert, updaten
    result = sb.table('maut_calculations') \
        .upsert(calculations, on_conflict='plate,date') \
        .execute()
    
    count = len(result.data)
    logger.info(f'{count} Maut-Berechnungen in Supabase gespeichert')
    return count

maut/send-report.name: Maut Report Versand
maut/send-report.description: Generiert einen Maut-Report und sendet ihn per Email. Zeigt Zusammenfassung, Anomalien und eine Tabelle aller Berechnungen. Nutzt das shared nacke/send-email Modul fuer den SMTP-Versand.
maut/send-report.code:
import logging logger = logging.getLogger('maut') def build_maut_report(calculations: list, anomalies: list) -> str: """Maut-Report als HTML generieren. Zeigt: - Zusammenfassung (Gesamt-km, Gesamt-Maut, Durchschnitt EUR/km) - Anomalien-Warnung (falls vorhanden) - Tabelle aller Eintraege """ total_km = sum(c['km'] for c in calculations) total_eur = sum(c['toll_eur'] for c in calculations) avg_per_km = round(total_eur / max(total_km, 1), 4) # Tabellen-Zeilen generieren rows = '' for c in calculations: color = '#e74c3c' if c in anomalies else '#333' rows += f""" {c['plate']}{c['route']} {c['km']}{c['toll_eur']:.2f} {c['toll_per_km']:.4f}{c['date']} """ anomaly_warning = '' if anomalies: anomaly_warning = f'

{len(anomalies)} Anomalien erkannt!

' return f"""

Mautberechnung Wochenreport

Gesamt: {total_km:.0f} km | {total_eur:.2f} EUR | {avg_per_km:.4f} EUR/km

{anomaly_warning} {rows}
KZStreckekmMautEUR/kmDatum
"""

"""
config.py - GV Overconfirmation v2.0 - Shared Configuration

CLI Args, .env Loading, config.json, Report-Dict, Logger.
"""

import json
import os
import sys
from datetime import date
from pathlib import Path

# ======================================================================
# CLI ARGS
# ======================================================================
DRY_RUN = "--dry-run" in sys.argv

CDP_PORT = 9222
if "--cdp-port" in sys.argv:
    idx = sys.argv.index("--cdp-port")
    if idx + 1 < len(sys.argv):
        CDP_PORT = int(sys.argv[idx + 1])

ENV_FILE = ".env"
if "--env-file" in sys.argv:
    idx = sys.argv.index("--env-file")
    if idx + 1 < len(sys.argv):
        ENV_FILE = sys.argv[idx + 1]

# Nach N consecutive already-processed Orders stoppt eine Richtung
EARLY_STOP_THRESHOLD = 3

# ======================================================================
# ENV + CONFIG
# ======================================================================
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv(ENV_FILE, encoding='utf-8-sig')

with open("config.json", "r", encoding="utf-8-sig") as f:
    CFG = json.load(f)

IDIS_URL = CFG["idis"]["url"]
IDIS_USER = os.getenv("IDIS_USERNAME", "")
IDIS_PASS = os.getenv("IDIS_PASSWORD", "")

# Supabase Report
REPORT_URL = CFG.get("report", {}).get("supabase_url", "")
MACHINE_TOKEN = os.getenv("MACHINE_TOKEN", "")
EMAIL_TO = CFG.get("report", {}).get("email_to", "")
EMAIL_CC = CFG.get("report", {}).get("email_cc", "")
EMAIL_BCC = CFG.get("report", {}).get("email_bcc", "")

# ======================================================================
# LOGGER
# ======================================================================
def P(msg):
    print(f"[{IDIS_USER}] {msg}", flush=True)

# ======================================================================
# REPORT COLLECTOR
# ======================================================================
REPORT = {
    "date": str(date.today()),
    "dry_run": DRY_RUN,
    "customer": "GV Spedition",
    "user": IDIS_USER,
    "cdp_port": CDP_PORT,
    "version": "v2.0",
    "bidirectional": False,
    "total_orders": 0,
    "total_amended": 0,
    "total_skipped": 0,
    "total_already_processed": 0,
    "total_errors": 0,
    "early_stopped": False,
    "amended_details": [],
    "skipped_details": [],
    "already_processed_details": [],
    "errors": [],
    "warnings": [],
    "duration_seconds": 0,
}


def report_error(order, reason, details=""):
    REPORT["errors"].append({"order": order, "reason": reason, "details": details})
    REPORT["total_errors"] += 1


def report_warning(msg):
    REPORT["warnings"].append(msg)

gv-overconfirmation-v2/browser.name: GV OC v2 - Browser
gv-overconfirmation-v2/browser.description: browser.py - GV Overconfirmation v2.0 - CDP Browser Management
gv-overconfirmation-v2/browser.code:
"""
browser.py - GV Overconfirmation v2.0 - CDP Browser Management

Chrome als detached Process starten, per CDP verbinden, Contexts erstellen.
"""

import subprocess
import time
import urllib.request
from pathlib import Path

from config import CDP_PORT, P


async def start_browser_detached():
    """Startet Chrome als detached Process und verbindet per CDP."""
    from playwright.async_api import async_playwright

    pw_temp = await async_playwright().start()
    chrome_path = pw_temp.chromium.executable_path
    await pw_temp.stop()

    already_running = False
    try:
        urllib.request.urlopen(f"http://localhost:{CDP_PORT}/json/version", timeout=2)
        already_running = True
        P(f"  [Browser] Chrome laeuft bereits auf Port {CDP_PORT}")
    except Exception:
        pass

    if not already_running:
        data_dir = rf"C:\GVOverconfirmation\chrome_data_{CDP_PORT}"
        Path(data_dir).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        subprocess.Popen(
            [chrome_path, f"--remote-debugging-port={CDP_PORT}",
             "--ignore-certificate-errors", "--no-first-run",
             "--no-default-browser-check", f"--user-data-dir={data_dir}",
             "--window-size=1400,900", "about:blank"],
            creationflags=0x00000008 | 0x00000200,
            stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL, stderr=subprocess.DEVNULL,
        )
        time.sleep(3)
        P(f"  [Browser] Chromium gestartet (Port {CDP_PORT}, detached)")

    pw = await async_playwright().start()
    browser = await pw.chromium.connect_over_cdp(f"http://localhost:{CDP_PORT}")

    # Verwaiste Contexts schliessen
    stale = 0
    for old_ctx in browser.contexts:
        try:
            pages = old_ctx.pages
            if not pages or all("about:blank" in (p.url or "") for p in pages):
                continue
            await old_ctx.close()
            stale += 1
        except Exception:
            pass
    if stale > 0:
        P(f"  [Browser] {stale} verwaiste Contexts geschlossen")

    return browser, pw


async def create_context(browser):
    """Erstellt einen neuen Browser-Context mit Page."""
    ctx = await browser.new_context(
        ignore_https_errors=True, viewport={"width": 1400, "height": 900},
    )
    page = await ctx.new_page()
    page.set_default_timeout(30000)
    return ctx, page

gv-overconfirmation-v2/idis.name: GV OC v2 - Idis
gv-overconfirmation-v2/idis.description: idis.py - GV Overconfirmation v2.0 - IDIS Login + AROS Navigation
gv-overconfirmation-v2/idis.code:
"""
idis.py - GV Overconfirmation v2.0 - IDIS Login + AROS Navigation

Login in IDIS Portal, Navigation zu Process AROS Orders, Filter setzen.
"""

from config import IDIS_URL, IDIS_USER, IDIS_PASS, P


async def login_idis(page, label=""):
    """Login in IDIS. Returns True on success."""
    tag = f"[{label}] " if label else ""
    P(f"  {tag}Navigiere zu {IDIS_URL}...")
    await page.goto(IDIS_URL, wait_until="domcontentloaded", timeout=30000)
    await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
    title = await page.title()

    if "Main Menu" in title or "AROS" in title:
        P(f"  {tag}Bereits eingeloggt: {title}")
        return True

    P(f"  {tag}Login mit User: {IDIS_USER}...")
    await page.fill('input[name="j_username"]', IDIS_USER)
    await page.fill('input[name="j_password"]', IDIS_PASS)
    await page.click('input[type="submit"][name="action"]')
    await page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle")
    await page.wait_for_timeout(1500)
    title = await page.title()
    P(f"  {tag}Login: {title}")

    if "Login" in title or "Error" in title:
        P(f"  {tag}Login FEHLGESCHLAGEN!")
        return False
    return True


async def navigate_to_aros(page, label=""):
    """Navigiert zu Process AROS Orders und zeigt Results."""
    tag = f"[{label}] " if label else ""

    # Process AROS Orders
    await page.click('input[name="mainForm:_idJsp53"]')
    await page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle")
    await page.wait_for_timeout(800)

    # Show Result (ohne Filter)
    await page.click('input[name="mainForm:_idJsp49"]')
    await page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle")
    await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)

    P(f"  {tag}AROS Orders geladen")

gv-overconfirmation-v2/processor.name: GV OC v2 - Processor
gv-overconfirmation-v2/processor.description: processor.py - GV Overconfirmation v2.0 - Bidirektionale Verarbeitung
gv-overconfirmation-v2/processor.code:
"""
processor.py - GV Overconfirmation v2.0 - Bidirektionale Verarbeitung

Zwei Modi:
  - Bidirektional: TOP (idx 0→N) + BOT (idx N→0) parallel via asyncio.gather
  - Zigzag Fallback: Single Context, alternierend oben/unten
"""

import time

from config import EARLY_STOP_THRESHOLD, REPORT, P, report_error
from overconfirmation import fill_amend_and_save


async def process_direction(page, valid_orders, indices, processed, do_save, label):
    """Verarbeitet Orders in einer Richtung. Stoppt bei Meeting-Point oder Early-Stop.

    Args:
        page: Playwright Page (eigener Context)
        valid_orders: Liste der Orders mit Bundle > 0
        indices: Reihenfolge der Indices (aufsteigend fuer TOP, absteigend fuer BOT)
        processed: Shared set() - Indices die bereits verarbeitet wurden
        do_save: True = Save, False = Dry Run
        label: "TOP" oder "BOT"

    Returns:
        dict: Statistiken (amended, skipped, already_processed, errors, details)
    """
    stats = {
        "amended": 0, "skipped": 0, "already_processed": 0, "errors": 0,
        "amended_details": [], "already_processed_details": [],
    }
    consecutive_already = 0

    for count, i in enumerate(indices):
        # Meeting-Point: anderer Bot hat diesen Index schon verarbeitet
        if i in processed:
            P(f"  [{label}] Index {i} von anderem Bot verarbeitet - STOP")
            break

        # Index als "in Bearbeitung" markieren
        processed.add(i)

        target = valid_orders[i]
        t_order = time.time()
        tag = f"[{label} {count+1}]"

        try:
            # Amend-Button klicken
            amend_sel = f'input[name="mainForm:_idJsp121:{target["idx"]}:_idJsp216"]'
            amend_btn = page.locator(amend_sel)
            if await amend_btn.count() == 0:
                report_error(target["order"], "Amend-Button nicht gefunden", amend_sel)
                stats["errors"] += 1
                P(f"  {tag} {target['order']} - SKIP (kein Amend)")
                continue

            await amend_btn.click()
            await page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle")

            # Overconfirmation + Save + Back
            result = await fill_amend_and_save(page, target["bundle"], do_save)

            changes = result.get("changes", [])
            changed = sum(1 for c in changes if c["delta"] != 0)
            elapsed = time.time() - t_order

            if changed == 0 and len(changes) > 0:
                # Alle Positionen bereits korrekt = already processed
                consecutive_already += 1
                stats["already_processed"] += 1
                stats["already_processed_details"].append({
                    "order": target["order"], "direction": label
                })
                P(f"  {tag} {target['order']:<28} already OK ({consecutive_already}/{EARLY_STOP_THRESHOLD}) {elapsed:.1f}s")

                if consecutive_already >= EARLY_STOP_THRESHOLD:
                    P(f"  [{label}] {EARLY_STOP_THRESHOLD}x consecutive already-processed - STOP")
                    break
            else:
                consecutive_already = 0
                stats["amended"] += 1

                for ch in changes:
                    if ch["delta"] != 0:
                        stats["amended_details"].append({
                            "order": target["order"],
                            "ordered": ch["ordered"],
                            "old_committed": ch["old"],
                            "new_committed": ch["neu"],
                            "delta": ch["delta"],
                            "bundle": target["bundle"],
                            "direction": label,
                        })

                save_mark = "SAVE" if (do_save and changed > 0) else ("dry" if not do_save else "OK")
                P(f"  {tag} {target['order']:<28} B={target['bundle']:<4} "
                  f"{len(changes)}pos {changed}chg [{save_mark}] {elapsed:.1f}s")

        except Exception as e:
            elapsed = time.time() - t_order
            report_error(target["order"], "Exception", str(e)[:120])
            stats["errors"] += 1
            P(f"  {tag} {target['order']} - FEHLER: {str(e)[:60]} {elapsed:.1f}s")

    return stats


async def process_zigzag(page, valid_orders, do_save):
    """Fallback: Verarbeitet Orders abwechselnd von oben und unten in einem Context."""
    P("  [ZIGZAG] Single-Context Modus (abwechselnd oben/unten)")
    processed = set()
    top_idx = 0
    bot_idx = len(valid_orders) - 1
    consecutive_already = 0
    count = 0

    while top_idx <= bot_idx:
        # --- TOP ---
        if top_idx <= bot_idx and top_idx not in processed:
            processed.add(top_idx)
            target = valid_orders[top_idx]
            count += 1
            t_order = time.time()

            try:
                amend_sel = f'input[name="mainForm:_idJsp121:{target["idx"]}:_idJsp216"]'
                amend_btn = page.locator(amend_sel)
                if await amend_btn.count() > 0:
                    await amend_btn.click()
                    await page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle")
                    result = await fill_amend_and_save(page, target["bundle"], do_save)
                    changes = result.get("changes", [])
                    changed = sum(1 for c in changes if c["delta"] != 0)
                    elapsed = time.time() - t_order

                    if changed == 0 and len(changes) > 0:
                        consecutive_already += 1
                        REPORT["total_already_processed"] += 1
                        REPORT["already_processed_details"].append({
                            "order": target["order"], "direction": "TOP"
                        })
                    else:
                        consecutive_already = 0
                        REPORT["total_amended"] += 1
                        for ch in changes:
                            if ch["delta"] != 0:
                                REPORT["amended_details"].append({
                                    "order": target["order"],
                                    "ordered": ch["ordered"],
                                    "old_committed": ch["old"],
                                    "new_committed": ch["neu"],
                                    "delta": ch["delta"],
                                    "bundle": target["bundle"],
                                    "direction": "TOP",
                                })

                    save_mark = "SAVE" if (do_save and changed > 0) else "OK"
                    P(f"  [TOP {count}] {target['order']:<28} B={target['bundle']:<4} "
                      f"{changed}chg [{save_mark}] {elapsed:.1f}s")
            except Exception as e:
                report_error(target["order"], "Exception", str(e)[:120])
                REPORT["total_errors"] += 1

            top_idx += 1

        if consecutive_already >= EARLY_STOP_THRESHOLD:
            P(f"  [ZIGZAG] {EARLY_STOP_THRESHOLD}x consecutive already-processed - STOP")
            break

        # --- BOTTOM ---
        if top_idx <= bot_idx and bot_idx not in processed:
            processed.add(bot_idx)
            target = valid_orders[bot_idx]
            count += 1
            t_order = time.time()

            try:
                amend_sel = f'input[name="mainForm:_idJsp121:{target["idx"]}:_idJsp216"]'
                amend_btn = page.locator(amend_sel)
                if await amend_btn.count() > 0:
                    await amend_btn.click()
                    await page.wait_for_load_state("networkidle")
                    result = await fill_amend_and_save(page, target["bundle"], do_save)
                    changes = result.get("changes", [])
                    changed = sum(1 for c in changes if c["delta"] != 0)
                    elapsed = time.time() - t_order

                    if changed == 0 and len(changes) > 0:
                        consecutive_already += 1
                        REPORT["total_already_processed"] += 1
                        REPORT["already_processed_details"].append({
                            "order": target["order"], "direction": "BOT"
                        })
                    else:
                        consecutive_already = 0
                        REPORT["total_amended"] += 1
                        for ch in changes:
                            if ch["delta"] != 0:
                                REPORT["amended_details"].append({
                                    "order": target["order"],
                                    "ordered": ch["ordered"],
                                    "old_committed": ch["old"],
                                    "new_committed": ch["neu"],
                                    "delta": ch["delta"],
                                    "bundle": target["bundle"],
                                    "direction": "BOT",
                                })

                    save_mark = "SAVE" if (do_save and changed > 0) else "OK"
                    P(f"  [BOT {count}] {target['order']:<28} B={target['bundle']:<4} "
                      f"{changed}chg [{save_mark}] {elapsed:.1f}s")
            except Exception as e:
                report_error(target["order"], "Exception", str(e)[:120])
                REPORT["total_errors"] += 1

            bot_idx -= 1

        if consecutive_already >= EARLY_STOP_THRESHOLD:
            P(f"  [ZIGZAG] {EARLY_STOP_THRESHOLD}x consecutive already-processed - STOP")
            break

gv-overconfirmation-v2/report.name: GV OC v2 - Report
gv-overconfirmation-v2/report.description: report.py - GV Overconfirmation v2.0 - Notifications + HTML Report + Push
gv-overconfirmation-v2/report.code:
""" report.py - GV Overconfirmation v2.0 - Notifications + HTML Report + Push Start-Notification, HTML-Report-Generierung, Report-Push via Edge Function. """ import json import urllib.request from datetime import date, datetime from config import ( REPORT, DRY_RUN, IDIS_USER, REPORT_URL, MACHINE_TOKEN, EMAIL_TO, EMAIL_CC, EMAIL_BCC, P, ) # ====================================================================== # START-BENACHRICHTIGUNG # ====================================================================== def push_start_notification(): """Sendet Start-Email via Supabase Edge Function.""" if not REPORT_URL or not MACHINE_TOKEN: P(" Start-Notification uebersprungen (kein REPORT_URL oder MACHINE_TOKEN)") return today = date.today().strftime("%d.%m.%Y") mode = "DRY RUN" if DRY_RUN else "PRODUCTION" html = f"""

GV Overconfirmation gestartet

{today} | {IDIS_USER} | {mode} | v2.0

IDIS User {IDIS_USER} wird verarbeitet (bidirektional: oben + unten gleichzeitig).

""" try: payload = { "machine_token": MACHINE_TOKEN, "report_type": "gv_overconfirmation_start", "email_to": EMAIL_TO, "email_cc": EMAIL_CC, "email_bcc": EMAIL_BCC, "data": {"date": str(date.today()), "user": IDIS_USER, "mode": mode}, "html_report": html, } body = json.dumps(payload).encode("utf-8") req = urllib.request.Request( REPORT_URL, data=body, headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST", ) resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=30) result = json.loads(resp.read()) if result.get("email", {}).get("sent"): P(f" Start-Notification gesendet") else: P(f" Start-Notification: {result.get('email', {}).get('error', 'unbekannt')[:60]}") except Exception as e: P(f" Start-Notification fehlgeschlagen: {str(e)[:60]}") # ====================================================================== # REPORT HTML GENERIERUNG # ====================================================================== def generate_report_html(): """Generiert den vollstaendigen HTML-Report.""" today = date.today().strftime("%d.%m.%Y") dur = REPORT["duration_seconds"] dur_str = f"{int(dur // 60)}m {int(dur % 60)}s" td = 'style="padding:6px 12px;border:1px solid #ddd"' td_c = 'style="padding:6px 12px;border:1px solid #ddd;text-align:center"' td_s = 'style="padding:4px 8px;border:1px solid #ddd;font-size:13px"' mode_badge = ('DRY RUN' if DRY_RUN else 'PRODUCTION') bi_badge = ('BIDIREKTIONAL' if REPORT["bidirectional"] else 'ZIGZAG') # Zusammenfassung summary_html = f"""
User{REPORT['user']}
Orders gesamt{REPORT['total_orders']}
Verarbeitet{REPORT['total_amended']}
Already processed{REPORT['total_already_processed']}
Skipped (Bundle=0){REPORT['total_skipped']}
Fehler{REPORT['total_errors']}
""" # Amendments Detail amend_html = "" if REPORT["amended_details"]: amend_rows = "" for a in REPORT["amended_details"]: amend_rows += f""" {a['order']} {a.get('direction', '')} {a['ordered']} {a['old_committed']} {a['new_committed']} +{a['delta']} {a['bundle']} """ amend_html = f"""

Hochgesetzte Orders ({len(REPORT['amended_details'])})

{amend_rows}
Order Richtung Bestellt Alt Neu Delta Bundle
""" # Fehler error_html = "" if REPORT["errors"]: error_rows = "" for e in REPORT["errors"]: error_rows += f""" {e['order']} {e['reason']} {e.get('details', '')} """ error_html = f"""

Fehler ({len(REPORT['errors'])})

{error_rows}
Order Grund Details
""" else: error_html = '

Keine Fehler.

' # Warnings warn_html = "" if REPORT["warnings"]: warn_items = "".join(f"
  • {w}
    • " for w in REPORT["warnings"]) warn_html = f'

    Hinweise

      {warn_items}
    ' html = f"""

    GV Spedition OC Report {mode_badge} {bi_badge}

    {today} | {REPORT['user']} | Dauer: {dur_str} | v2.0

    {summary_html} {amend_html} {error_html} {warn_html}
    GV Overconfirmation v2.0 (modular) | Exasync IDIS Automation | {datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')}
    """ return html # ====================================================================== # REPORT PUSH (Supabase Edge Function) # ====================================================================== def push_report(html_report=""): """Pusht den Report an die Supabase Edge Function und sendet Email.""" if not REPORT_URL or not MACHINE_TOKEN: P(" Report-Push uebersprungen (kein REPORT_URL oder MACHINE_TOKEN)") return try: payload = { "machine_token": MACHINE_TOKEN, "report_type": "gv_overconfirmation", "data": REPORT, "email_to": EMAIL_TO, "email_cc": EMAIL_CC, "email_bcc": EMAIL_BCC, } if html_report: payload["html_report"] = html_report body = json.dumps(payload).encode("utf-8") req = urllib.request.Request( REPORT_URL, data=body, headers={"Content-Type": "application/json"}, method="POST", ) resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=30) result = json.loads(resp.read()) P(f" Report gepusht: {result.get('ok', False)}") email = result.get("email", {}) if email.get("sent"): P(f" Email gesendet an: {email.get('to', EMAIL_TO)}") elif email.get("error"): P(f" Email fehlgeschlagen: {email.get('error', '')[:60]}") except Exception as e: P(f" Report push fehlgeschlagen: {str(e)[:80]}")

gv-overconfirmation-v2/main.name: GV OC v2 - Main
gv-overconfirmation-v2/main.description: main.py - GV Overconfirmation v2.0 - Pipeline Orchestrator
gv-overconfirmation-v2/main.code:
"""
main.py - GV Overconfirmation v2.0 - Pipeline Orchestrator

Orchestriert alle Module: Browser → Login → AROS → Orders → Processing → Report.
Bidirektionaler Modus mit Zigzag-Fallback.

Usage:
  python main.py                                        # Production
  python main.py --dry-run                              # Kein Save
  python main.py --env-file .env.idis735 --cdp-port 9223
"""

import asyncio
import json
import sys
import time
from datetime import date
from pathlib import Path

# Encoding Fix fuer Windows (charmap-Crash verhindern)
sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8', errors='replace')

from config import (
    REPORT, DRY_RUN, IDIS_USER, CDP_PORT, ENV_FILE,
    P, report_warning,
)
from browser import start_browser_detached, create_context
from idis import login_idis, navigate_to_aros
from orders import read_table_full, classify_orders
from processor import process_direction, process_zigzag
from report import push_start_notification, generate_report_html, push_report


async def main():
    t_start = time.time()
    Path("reports").mkdir(exist_ok=True)

    mode_str = "DRY RUN" if DRY_RUN else "PRODUCTION"
    P("")
    P("=" * 65)
    P(f"  GV OVERCONFIRMATION v2.0 - {mode_str}")
    P(f"  User: {IDIS_USER} | Port: {CDP_PORT} | Modular")
    P("=" * 65)

    if not IDIS_USER:
        P(f"  WARNUNG: Credentials leer! Pruefe {ENV_FILE}")
        report_warning(f"IDIS Credentials nicht gesetzt ({ENV_FILE})")

    # --- Browser starten ---
    browser, pw = await start_browser_detached()

    try:
        await _run_pipeline(browser, pw, t_start)
    finally:
        try:
            await pw.stop()
            P("  [Cleanup] Playwright disconnected")
        except Exception:
            pass


async def _run_pipeline(browser, pw, t_start):
    """Hauptpipeline: Login, Bidirektional/Zigzag, Report."""

    # --- Context 1 (TOP bot) ---
    ctx_top, page_top = await create_context(browser)
    login_ok = await login_idis(page_top, "TOP")
    if not login_ok:
        P("  Login fehlgeschlagen - Abbruch")
        await ctx_top.close()
        return

    # --- Start-Benachrichtigung ---
    push_start_notification()

    # --- Navigate TOP to AROS orders ---
    await navigate_to_aros(page_top, "TOP")

    # --- Order-Liste lesen ---
    orders = await read_table_full(page_top)
    P(f"  {len(orders)} Orders geladen")
    REPORT["total_orders"] = len(orders)

    if not orders:
        P("  Keine Orders - fertig")
        REPORT["duration_seconds"] = round(time.time() - t_start, 1)
        html = generate_report_html()
        push_report(html)
        await ctx_top.close()
        return

    # --- Orders klassifizieren ---
    valid_orders = classify_orders(orders)

    P(f"  Zu verarbeiten: {len(valid_orders)} | Skipped: {REPORT['total_skipped']}")

    if not valid_orders:
        P("  Keine Orders mit Bundle > 0 - fertig")
        REPORT["duration_seconds"] = round(time.time() - t_start, 1)
        html = generate_report_html()
        push_report(html)
        await ctx_top.close()
        return

    do_save = not DRY_RUN
    N = len(valid_orders)

    # --- Bidirektional versuchen (2 Contexts) ---
    bidirectional = False
    ctx_bot = None
    page_bot = None

    try:
        ctx_bot, page_bot = await create_context(browser)
        login_ok_bot = await login_idis(page_bot, "BOT")
        if login_ok_bot:
            await navigate_to_aros(page_bot, "BOT")
            bidirectional = True
            P(f"  Bidirektional aktiv: TOP (0->{N-1}) + BOT ({N-1}->0)")
        else:
            P(f"  BOT Login fehlgeschlagen - Fallback auf Zigzag")
            await ctx_bot.close()
            ctx_bot = None
    except Exception as e:
        P(f"  Zweiter Context fehlgeschlagen: {str(e)[:60]}")
        P(f"  Fallback auf Zigzag-Modus")
        if ctx_bot:
            try:
                await ctx_bot.close()
            except Exception:
                pass
            ctx_bot = None

    REPORT["bidirectional"] = bidirectional

    # --- Verarbeitung ---
    if bidirectional:
        processed = set()

        top_indices = list(range(N))
        bot_indices = list(range(N - 1, -1, -1))

        P(f"\n  === BIDIREKTIONAL START ===")

        top_stats, bot_stats = await asyncio.gather(
            process_direction(page_top, valid_orders, top_indices, processed, do_save, "TOP"),
            process_direction(page_bot, valid_orders, bot_indices, processed, do_save, "BOT"),
        )

        # Merge stats
        for stats in [top_stats, bot_stats]:
            REPORT["total_amended"] += stats["amended"]
            REPORT["total_already_processed"] += stats["already_processed"]
            REPORT["total_errors"] += stats["errors"]
            REPORT["amended_details"].extend(stats["amended_details"])
            REPORT["already_processed_details"].extend(stats["already_processed_details"])

        P(f"\n  === BIDIREKTIONAL FERTIG ===")
        P(f"  TOP: {top_stats['amended']} amended, {top_stats['already_processed']} already")
        P(f"  BOT: {bot_stats['amended']} amended, {bot_stats['already_processed']} already")

    else:
        # Zigzag Fallback
        await process_zigzag(page_top, valid_orders, do_save)

    # --- Report ---
    REPORT["duration_seconds"] = round(time.time() - t_start, 1)

    P("")
    P("=" * 65)
    P("  REPORT")
    P("=" * 65)
    P(f"  Datum:        {date.today()}")
    P(f"  User:         {IDIS_USER}")
    P(f"  Modus:        {'DRY RUN' if DRY_RUN else 'PRODUCTION'} | {'Bidirektional' if bidirectional else 'Zigzag'}")
    P(f"  Dauer:        {REPORT['duration_seconds']:.1f}s")
    P(f"  Orders total: {REPORT['total_orders']}")
    P(f"  Verarbeitet:  {REPORT['total_amended']}")
    P(f"  Already OK:   {REPORT['total_already_processed']}")
    P(f"  Skipped:      {REPORT['total_skipped']}")
    P(f"  Fehler:       {REPORT['total_errors']}")

    if REPORT["amended_details"]:
        P("\n  HOCHGESETZTE ORDERS:")
        for a in REPORT["amended_details"]:
            P(f"    {a['order']:30s} [{a.get('direction','')}] "
              f"Bestellt={a['ordered']:>5}  Alt={a['old_committed']:>5}  "
              f"Neu={a['new_committed']:>5}  Delta=+{a['delta']:<4}  Bundle={a['bundle']}")

    if REPORT["errors"]:
        P("\n  FEHLER:")
        for e in REPORT["errors"]:
            P(f"    {e['order']}: {e['reason']} - {e.get('details', '')}")

    if REPORT["warnings"]:
        P(f"\n  WARNUNGEN ({len(REPORT['warnings'])}):")
        for w in REPORT["warnings"]:
            P(f"    - {w}")

    # Report-Dateien
    report_date = date.today().strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
    with open(f"reports/report_{report_date}_{IDIS_USER}.json", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        json.dump(REPORT, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
    P(f"\n  JSON: reports/report_{report_date}_{IDIS_USER}.json")

    html = generate_report_html()
    with open(f"reports/report_{report_date}_{IDIS_USER}.html", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(html)
    P(f"  HTML: reports/report_{report_date}_{IDIS_USER}.html")

    push_report(html)

    # --- Cleanup ---
    P("\n" + "=" * 65)
    P("  Pipeline abgeschlossen.")
    P("=" * 65)

    try:
        await ctx_top.close()
    except Exception:
        pass
    if ctx_bot:
        try:
            await ctx_bot.close()
        except Exception:
            pass


if __name__ == "__main__":
    asyncio.run(main())
